programme.title: CINTA DARI SURGA EPS 24
programme.desc: It tells the story of Cinta (Melayu Nicole Hall), who is caught in a complicated love triangle with Revan and Bayu, filled with action and comedy. Cinta is forced to marry Viko to save her adoptive mother, leading to a deeply difficult and emotional dilemma.

programme.title: ADA DUA CINTA EPS 30
programme.desc: It tells the story of two girls, Mecca (who comes from humble circumstances) and Medina (who is wealthy), who are connected through Ayu—Mecca's biological mother—who adopted Medina. Conflict arises when they both fall in love with the same man, creating an emotional romantic drama that tugs at the heartstrings.

programme.title: CINTA SEPENUH JIWA EPS 103
programme.desc: Lala is a young girl, the second daughter of Andi and Desi, who since childhood has carried enthusiasm and a smile with her every step. Her life is simple but full of color thanks to one thing she truly loves: cooking. For Lala, the kitchen is not just a place to prepare ingredients. It is a space for expression, a place where she pours out her emotions, wraps stories into every seasoning, and ser

programme.title: CAHAYA TERINDAH EPS 13
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Indah (Ranty Maria) and her struggle to find her biological family after discovering that she was adopted. She runs away to Jakarta from her adoptive father (Jamal), who intends to sell her, and ends up working for the Hendardi family, where she faces romantic conflicts and emotional mysteries from her past.

programme.title: KESETIAAN JANJI CINTA EPS 90
programme.desc: Meira no longer feels happy in her marriage. Lately, Arya, her husband, constantly looks for faults in her. As a result, Meira and Arya often get into arguments. The situation reaches its peak when Arya refuses to provide for Meira anymore. He even refuses to help cover the medical expenses of Meira's mother, Siti. Arya also stops paying for Lani's college tuition, Meira's younger sister. Even tho

programme.title: KARENA AKU SAYANG 35
programme.desc: Kenzie is a man who has experienced countless traumatic events in his past. These experiences have shaped him into a perfectionist who often makes things difficult for those around him. One of them is Zara, his personal assistant, who constantly tries to cheer him up as he frequently experiences mood swings in various situations.

programme.title: CINTA BERAKHIR BAHAGIA 64
programme.desc: Adisty, a beautiful young woman who serves as the backbone of her family, nearly becomes a sex worker to pay off her family's debts. programme.desc: Drug-free patches use Far Infrared and acupoint therapy to relieve cold and flu symptoms naturally. The Cold & Flu Patch eases a blocked nose, sinus pressure and chills. The Cough Relief Patch comes in adult and child versions to soothe coughs and calm throat irritation for easier breathing. Safe for daily use, they offer up to 6 hours of comfort for the whole family.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 309
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Available in multiple sizes, there’s a perfect container for every freezer storage need.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 316
programme.desc: A simple, plant based organic three-step system designed to naturally restore scalp health, block DHT, and revive dormant roots for noticeably thicker, fuller hair. Safe for anyone above 4 yrs old and stop Excessive Hair Shedding in One Week!

programme.title: Hong Kong Chef’s Culinary Adventures - EP 20 / 他乡的煮人
programme.desc: Hong Kong has many talented chefs who combine Cantonese and Western cooking. This special "Hong Kong flavour" is famous worldwide. In countries like Canada, Australia, the UK, and Japan, people can discover Hong Kong chefs living and cooking locally.

programme.title: Legendary Taste of Sichuan S4 - EP 2 / 川味 第四季(下)
programme.desc: In Legendary Taste of Sichuan S4, the director, Bin Ge and his team will continue to go deep into the countryside, following the smell of cooking, using the camera once again, to interpret the tie or relationship between people and food. He returns home, but is shocked to find his mother lying motionlessly in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Another Wok of Life - EP 2 / 人生酱美味
programme.desc: Two years later, Zhenbang can finally remove the electronic monitoring tag on his ankle. He meets Buffett, who brings him to Hui Tou Lu. Emergency response providers put their lives at risk to save others.
A night at an amusement park takes a deadly turn when a roller coaster malfunction leaves lives hanging in the balance; Abby reaches out to Buck; Athena and Hen respond to an unusual home invasion.

The crew races to an emergency at an Indian wedding; Abby enlists Buck to help her find her mother; Abby meets Athena for the first time; Bobby confronts his past; Hen struggles to make the right decision.

On Valentine's Day, a surprise marriage proposal goes awry with dangerous consequences; Athena attempts to help a desperate woman; Bobby and Chimney pull holiday duty; Abby and Buck go on their first official date.

The first responders race to rescue victims trapped in various tight spots; Athena contemplates accepting a promotion that will take her out of the field; Chimney finally deals with the aftermath of his near fatal car crash.

Maddie goes on a ride-along with Athena; Hen must figure out how to save her family from permanently falling apart; the first responders deal with emergencies both at a military funeral and a movie theater.

The first responders unwittingly become the subject of an eager reporter's first on-air assignment; Athena prepares for May's homecoming dance; the team responds to emergencies at an eating contest, a bodybuilding competition and a toddler pageant.

Halloween finds the first responders racing to the rescue at a cemetery, a haunted hayride and a spooky parade; Maddie thinks she has received a "ghost" call from a missing hiker; Hen is in a life-or-death situation with her father.

Buck jumps back into the dating scene but fears he will return to his old ways; a woman goes to great extremes on a freeway overpass to get the attention of her husband; a couple have a car accident on their wedding day.
Hen relives her evolution into the firefighter she is today as she recalls the first times she met Chimney and Athena.

programme.desc: Menjejak rumah-rumah cantik di Sarawak. Keindahan adalah subjektif, maka program ini menampil pelbagai jenis rumah, bukan hanya banglo mewah, tetapi juga rumah tradisional dan sederhana yang dihias indah.

programme.title: Unearth Sarawak: Indigenous Cuisines Ep10
programme.desc: Showcases iconic and forgotten cuisines from Bidayuh, Melanau, Chinese, Iban, and Orang Ulu ethnics, aiming to preserve heritage cuisines, boost local communities, and promote gastronomy tourism.

programme.title: Negeri Yang Hilang Di Sarawak Ep02
programme.desc: Datu Dr.Haji Sanib bin Haji Said yang menghabiskan sepanjang hayatnya mengabdi sebagai ilmuwan dan cendekiawan. Biografi beliau menjadi intipati utama dalam mencari negeri Melayu yang hilang di Sarawak.

programme.title: Makan Lokal Ep10
programme.desc: Makan Lokal adalah rancangan di mana hos, Jaslin Puasa, menjelajah dan merasai pelbagai hidangan tempatan Malaysia, sambil meneroka budaya dan tradisi di sebalik setiap makanan.

programme.title: Borneo Tech Heroes Ep02
programme.desc: Borneo's digital revolution in this documentary,showcasing innovative tech,thriving startups,and how they're transforming communities and reshaping the island's socio-economic landscape in the 4.0 era.

programme.title: Startup Sarawak Ep03

programme.title: Wingbeats of Borneo Ep05
programme.desc: The Wingbeats of Borneo explores the journey of 52 bird species unique to Borneo. Spanning Sarawak and Sabah, boasts rich biodiversity and rare species, perfect for birdwatchers and photographers alike.

programme.title: Bujang Berani S2 Ep04
programme.desc: Memaparkan patriot Sarawak yang tidak didendang dan yang masih hidup untuk menceritakan kisahnya. 3 episode menampilkan 3 pahlawan lelaki, 3 episode menampilkan tokoh wanita (women empowerment).

programme.desc: Louis Bloom, a petty thief, realises that he can make money by capturing photographs of crime scenes and starts resorting to extreme tactics to get them.

programme.desc: Billy, a struggling single mother, gets pulled into a dangerous underworld while her son discovers a hidden underwater town.

programme.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 2
programme.desc: The Bride, who's now pregnant, sets off to kill her ex-boss and lover Bill, his brother, Budd the bouncer, and one-eyed Elle.

programme.desc: Documentary follows Jennifer Lopez's personal and professional journey during her first global tour. Later, it reveals behind-the-scenes moments on and off-stage.

programme.desc: A geriatric gangster's release from prison leads to a reunion with his two partners in crime, one of whom has orders to kill him.

programme.title: Julie & Julia

programme.title: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: After witnessing the horrifying murder of his father, a young man sets out to seek retribution and attempts to bring down a crime lord.

programme.title: Ghost Father
programme.desc: A student is hired to look after the little girl of a wealthy single mom who is usually away for work. The mother and daughter live in a mansion located in near a pine forest. programme.title: Congkak

programme.title: Kisah Seram Hostel

programme.title: SLR
programme.desc: Dan is a photography student. His professor rewards him for his excellent work with an SLR camera. Excited, Dan immediately starts exploring the features. Unfortunately for him, the SLR camera is haunted and the Devil challenges him to push the boundaries of photography. With the support of his friend and girlfriend, Dan can either accept the challenge, or fight back.

programme.title: Sleeping Beauties
programme.desc: Pregnant and recently widowed Cahya gets a job as a maid working in an isolated old mansion. Unable to take the loneliness anymore, she opens a doorway to the spirit world to reconnect with her late husband. In doing so, she inadvertently awakens the tormented ghosts of the mansion's previous owner and the maids.

programme.title: Malam Tahlil Suhaila Balik

programme.desc: A group of mischievous college students led by Hani, uses recording of prank victims to gain fame and popularity through their social media platform. But everything suddenly changes when the college decides to suspend Hani after finding out one of the prank victims, Puteri, had attempted to commit suicide when her embarrassing prank video was released online. Now, her gang agree to demote Hani.

programme.title: Jodoh Syaitan
programme.desc: Megat returns to his village to be married off to a woman of his mother's choice. Awang and Kulup, are tasked by Tok Chai to look for a dead body to bring back to life.

programme.title: You Die
programme.desc: After lending a complete stranger her phone, Asia becomes stuck with a new augmented reality app that is actually connected to the world of the dead, letting her see them through the phone's camera. The downside to it is that it will result in its user's death after twenty-four hours.

programme.title: The Story of the Death
programme.desc: Border patrol Police Lieutenant Aod, sends his subordinates to bust a drug trafficking operation. Due to serving on the force for many years, he was away from his parents for a long time. Therefore, he requested to be transferred back to Bangkok to care for his parents. Many years later, his parents die from disease. Aod continues to live alone at home and does not associate with anyone.

programme.title: Pintu Neraka

programme.title: The Whale Whisperer
programme.desc: This film follows the inspiring relationship between whale whisperer Vicki Neville and thehumpback whales of Australia. Never-before-seen behaviours have been documented by a team of five cinematographers over the three-month whale season in Hervey Bay, all captured in glorious 4K. These stunning close encounters capture whales like you have never seen them before!

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: Catfish and Rooftop go on a mission with the Colombian military's anti-narcotics division, test bulletproof clothing on themselves and experience the most painful insect sting in the world.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: After a morning on the Bayou, the Duck Camp Dinners crew enjoy a fresh cooked dinner while discussing the changing coastal wetlands of Louisiana. Jean-Paul gets to finally a hunt an area he had only heard about as a young man, and takes in the beauty of the live cypress trees this camp is known for.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: After a late night of good times, venison chili, and some old school roux the crew heads out for another day of hunting ducks. Adaptability is critical, and after a couple of quick adjustments the team finds themselves back in the ducks.

programme.title: She's Out of My League
programme.desc: An insecure airport security officer’s world shifts when a confident and beautiful woman shows interest in him, forcing him to confront self-doubt and social expectations.

programme.title: Maid in Manhattan
programme.desc: The heir to a political dynasty falls for a hotel maid who is also single mother, thinking of her to be a socialite. However, both realise that they are completely different as the truth comes out.

programme.title: The Lake House
programme.desc: Love blooms when Kate, a doctor, exchanges letters with Alex, an architect who is fed up with his life. Unknown to them, they lead lives two years apart.

programme.title: It's Complicated
programme.desc: Jane, a divorcee, runs into her ex-husband at their son's graduation ceremony. Since they are divorced and he has remarried, problems evolve when they start falling in love all over again.

programme.title: Shall We Dance?
programme.desc: John Clark, a lawyer, finds his marriage losing its spark. In an attempt to find a new passion for himself, he enrols in a dance studio where Paulina catches his eye.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a barren island, a robot named Roz must rapidly adapt to the wild. It soon forms an unlikely parental bond with an orphaned gosling, finding connection in isolation.

programme.title: Carpool
programme.desc: Daniel Miller has to take care of the carpool for his sons and the neighbourhood school children when his wife falls sick. However, in the course of the day, he finds himself a victim of a robbery.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: Gracie Hart, a tomboyish FBI agent, goes undercover as a contestant in the Miss United States beauty pageant when a terrorist threatens to bomb the event.

programme.title: Superbuns
programme.desc: Buns embarks on a journey with Blossom to meet her science hero.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!

programme.title: Barney's World
programme.desc: Vivie is filled with angry feelings when a pigeon ruins her painting; Barney and the kids play Pirates and the Sea Queen to help calm Vivie's anger and learn healthy ways to deal with feelings.

programme.title: Miss Persona
programme.desc: Grampy sends Miss Persona a gift; Miss Persona unwraps it to discover a pair of socks and buttons; she explores the sensory experience of the items and even creates a sock puppet.

programme.title: Toon Bops
programme.desc: Little Bob the Hedgehog rolls and bounces around singing his silly song about being happy and having a fun time.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George hunt nocturnal animals; Peppa packs her bags for a trip; the family arrives in Italy; Peppa eats pizza, buys presents and sends a postcard.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble moves with his family of construction pups to the nearby town of Builder Cove where they live, play and build whatever the community needs.

programme.desc: When the Legion of Zoom plans to cheat its way to winning the Gotham Grand Prix, the Batwheels zoom into action to ensure the race is won fairly.

programme.title: Bugs Bunny Builders
programme.desc: The Looney crew builds a flower float for the spring parade, but Dickie has very specific ideas about it.

programme.title: Agent Binky: Pets of the Universe
